all.en: This notice serves as a reminder of our annual anti-harassment training.
all.zh: 本通知旨在提醒各位本年度的反騷擾訓練。

all.en: Participation is mandatory for every employee, contractor, and intern.
all.zh: 所有員工、承包商及實習生皆須參加。

all.en: The training reinforces our commitment to a safe and respectful workplace.
all.zh: 本訓練再次強調我們對安全且尊重職場的承諾。

all.en: It also ensures compliance with current employment laws and regulations.
all.zh: 並確保符合現行勞動法規與規範。

all.en: This year course has been refreshed with updated case studies and scenarios.
all.zh: 今年課程已更新案例研究及情境內容。

all.en: Topics include verbal, physical, visual, and digital forms of harassment.
all.zh: 主題包括言語、肢體、視覺及數位形式的騷擾。

all.en: Special attention is given to subtle behaviors such as microaggressions.
all.zh: 特別關注如微歧視等較不明顯的行為。

all.en: The module covers bystander intervention strategies in a variety of situations.
all.zh: 模組涵蓋於各種情境中的旁觀者介入策略。

all.en: Practical guidance is provided on how to escalate concerns appropriately.
all.zh: 並提供如何適當升級通報疑慮的實用指引。

all.en: Managers receive an additional session focused on their unique responsibilities.
all.zh: 主管將另接受一場聚焦其特有責任的訓練。

all.en: The manager session covers recognizing warning signs and supporting affected employees.
all.zh: 主管場次涵蓋辨識警訊及支援受影響員工。

all.en: Both sessions are available in English, Mandarin, Japanese, and Korean.
all.zh: 兩場次均提供英文、中文、日文及韓文版本。

all.en: Live virtual sessions are scheduled across multiple time zones for convenience.
all.zh: 為方便起見，現場線上場次橫跨多個時區安排。

all.en: A self-paced version is also available through the learning management system.
all.zh: 亦可透過學習管理系統使用自學版本。

all.en: The standard course takes approximately ninety minutes to complete.
all.zh: 標準課程約需九十分鐘完成。

all.en: Completion is required no later than the thirtieth of next month.
all.zh: 完成期限不得晚於下個月三十日。

all.en: A short knowledge check at the end confirms understanding of key concepts.
all.zh: 課程末尾設有簡短知識檢核以確認對重點概念的理解。

all.en: A passing score of eighty percent is required for course credit.
all.zh: 課程學分要求通過分數需達百分之八十。

all.en: If you wish to report a concern, please contact the ethics office.
all.zh: 若您希望通報相關疑慮，請聯絡倫理辦公室。

all.en: Multiple confidential reporting channels remain available year-round.
all.zh: 多個保密通報管道全年持續開放。

all.en: Retaliation against anyone who reports in good faith is strictly prohibited.
all.zh: 對善意通報者的任何報復行為均嚴格禁止。

all.en: Completion records are stored securely and used solely for compliance purposes.
all.zh: 完成紀錄將安全保存並僅用於合規目的。

all.en: Thank you for helping us maintain a workplace where everyone can thrive.
all.zh: 感謝您協助我們維持一個讓每個人都能發展的職場。
